title: TCP Three-Way Handshake and Connection Termination
description: A flowchart showing the sequence of messages exchanged between a client and a server to establish (SYN, SYN-ACK, ACK) and terminate (FIN, ACK) a reliable TCP connection.
relationships: Server acknowledges and synchronizes with SYN-ACK
Client acknowledges with ACK to establish connection
Either host can initiate termination with FIN
The other host acknowledges the FIN with ACK
